Prof. Dr. Önder Pekcan Receives International “Best Researcher Award”

Kadir Has University faculty member

has been honored with the

within the scope of the

International Research Awards on Sensing Technology

.

This prestigious award, granted entirely on the basis of merit, aims to recognize pioneering researchers who are shaping the future of sensor technologies. The evaluation process takes into account factors such as recent publications, the quality and originality of research articles, and overall scientific performance.

Prof. Dr. Pekcan, a distinguished physicist known for his impressive academic background, extensive professional experience, and significant contributions to the scientific community, has been selected as the recipient of this notable award.

As

Kadir Has University

, we take great pride in our faculty member’s outstanding international achievement and wish him continued success in his inspiring research journey that contributes to the advancement of science.
